segments.text: I will extol you, my God and King, and bless your name forever and ever.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Every day I will bless you and praise your name forever and ever.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised, and his greatness is unsearchable.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: and of his greatness there is no search

segments.text: One generation shall commend your works to another, and shall declare your mighty acts.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: On the glorious splendor of your majesty, and on your wondrous works, I will meditate.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They shall speak of the might of your awesome deeds, and I will declare your greatness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They shall pour forth the fame of your abundant goodness and shall sing aloud of your righteousness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The LORD is gracious and merciful, slow to anger and abounding in steadfast love.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: of great mercy: Heb. great in mercy

segments.text: The LORD is good to all, and his mercy is over all that he has made.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: All your works shall give thanks to you, O LORD, and all your saints shall bless you!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They shall speak of the glory of your kingdom and tell of your power,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: to make known to the children of man your mighty deeds, and the glorious splendor of your kingdom.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and your dominion endures throughout all generations.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: an everlasting kingdom: Heb. a kingdom of all ages

segments.text: The LORD upholds all who are falling and raises up all who are bowed down.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The eyes of all look to you, and you give them their food in due season.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You open your hand; you satisfy the desire of every living thing.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The LORD is righteous in all his ways and kind in all his works.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The LORD is near to all who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He fulfills the desire of those who fear him; he also hears their cry and saves them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The LORD preserves all who love him, but all the wicked he will destroy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My mouth will speak the praise of the LORD, and let all flesh bless his holy name forever and ever.
segments.speaker: David
